subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: The great Sacrifice is to forget one's self entirely--to sacrifice everything, as did Christ.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ
